login.title: Sign in
login.demo_hint: Use one of the demo entries below or sign in manually with the mock credentials.
login.demo_credentials: Student demo: student@ieltsmock.dev / demo1234. Teacher demo: teacher@ieltsmock.dev / demo1234.

register.title: Create your account
register.terms: By signing up you agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
register.success_check_email: We sent a confirmation link to your email. Open it to activate your account, then sign in.

confirm.title: Confirm account
confirm.expired: Confirmation link is expired or already used.
confirm.generic_error: Unable to confirm account. Please try again later.

validation.email_invalid: Email must be a valid email address
validation.password_min: Password must be at least {{count}} characters

ielts.headline: Band 9.0
ielts.subtitle: Reading, Writing and Listening practice with analytics-ready review.

dashboard.subtitle: Welcome back, {{name}}. Your current estimated overall band is {{band}}.
dashboard.speaking_coming_soon: Speaking will stay visible in the product, but the full testing flow is not enabled yet.
dashboard.plan_unavailable: Current plan data is not available from the API yet.
dashboard.plan_cta: Billing and renewals will connect once backend subscriptions are ready.
dashboard.empty_quick_links: Quick links are not available yet.

reading.title: Reading
reading.description: Texts and comprehension tasks in IELTS format.

writing.title: Writing
writing.description: Task 1 and Task 2 writing practice with mock rubric feedback.

listening.title: Listening
listening.description: Audio-based practice with note completion and exam-style questions.

speaking.title: Speaking
speaking.description: Live speaking simulation with examiner turn-taking and part-by-part progression.
speaking.integrity_warning: {{count}} integrity event(s) recorded in this session.
speaking.question: Question
speaking.end_exam_confirm_body: The session will be finalized and moved to result review.

overall.title: Overall exam
overall.description: Combined IELTS flow: Listening, Reading, Writing, and Speaking with managed breaks.
overall.resume_notice: An in-progress overall attempt was found. Continue from the current stage.
overall.result_description: Combined audit for Listening, Reading, Writing, and Speaking in one attempt.
overall.break_description: Take a short rest before the next module.
overall.break_no_penalty: You can leave this page during break and continue later without penalty.

my_tests.title: My tests
my_tests.description: Track every reading, listening, writing and speaking attempt from one place.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Your learner profile, target band, streak and recent performance.

teacher.dashboard_description: Welcome back, {{name}}. Review your students, risk signals and recent attempts.
teacher.students_description: Search, filter and review student performance across modules.
teacher.student_details_description: Detailed student analytics with recent attempts, writing submissions and integrity history.
teacher.analytics_description: Distribution-style summaries for weak areas, question types and completion quality.
teacher.mentor_note_placeholder: Backend mentor notes will be attached here later. For MVP this stays as a structured placeholder block.
teacher.integrity_note: This attempt includes integrity events and should be reviewed before assigning next homework.

shared.empty_description: Try another filter or search term.
shared.tip_exam_1: Use the navigator to monitor unanswered questions before submit.
shared.tip_exam_2: Autosave works only while the exam tab stays active.
shared.tip_exam_3: Reserve the final minutes for flagged items and timing control.
shared.tip_speaking_1: Keep answers natural and extend ideas with a concrete example.
shared.tip_speaking_2: If you lose focus, reconnect to the prompt before adding new points.
shared.tip_speaking_3: Use your note window in Part 2 to structure the long turn quickly.
shared.tip_writing_1: Spend a few minutes planning paragraph structure before drafting.
shared.tip_writing_2: Keep Task 2 long enough to protect the overall writing band.
shared.tip_writing_3: Use the final review to fix grammar slips and repetition.
shared.integrity_terminated: This attempt was terminated because the exam tab or window was left during an active session.
shared.session_locked: This session is no longer active. Review is still available.
shared.answer_review_description: Compare your saved answers with the correct responses and spot repeat patterns.
shared.no_strengths: No strong area has been identified yet.
shared.no_weaknesses: No weak area has been identified yet.
shared.audio_progress: Transcript stays hidden during the session. This shell preserves the correct listening flow.
shared.listening_strict_audio_notice: IELTS-style listening mode: playback is continuous, pause/seek are disabled, only volume control is available.
shared.listening_tap_to_start_audio: Tap once to allow secure playback in this browser.
shared.exam_strict_mode_notice: Strict exam mode is active: leaving the tab/window, route changes, and copy/paste actions will end the attempt early.
shared.submit_confirm_description: {{count}} questions are still unanswered. You can submit now or return to review them.
shared.leave_warning_description: You tried to leave the active test. Close this dialog to continue the test, or finish now to end this attempt as user left.
shared.writing_submit_confirm: Both tasks will be locked after submission. Continue only if the final draft is ready.
shared.integrity_dialog_description: Leaving the exam tab triggered a strict integrity rule. The attempt cannot continue.
shared.resume_available: An unfinished attempt was found for this test. You can continue from where you stopped.
shared.time_is_up_notice: Time is up. The backend will mark this attempt as time expired after the final submit.
shared.submit_requires_choice_answers: {{count}} question(s) are unanswered. If you submit now, they will be marked incorrect.
shared.submit_requires_writing_answers: {{count}} writing task(s) are empty. If you submit now, they will be marked incorrect.
shared.result_unavailable_description: This browser does not have the saved submit response for this attempt, so the review cannot be opened here.
shared.result_summary_only: Detailed per-question review is not available for this attempt.
shared.no_passage: No passage is available for this section.
shared.no_questions: No questions are available in this section.
shared.evaluation_pending: AI evaluation is still in progress. Detailed review will appear after backend processing.
shared.ai_summary_subtitle: Auto coaching analysis for this attempt
shared.ai_summary_empty: AI summary is not ready for this attempt yet.
shared.ai_summary_processing: AI coach is still generating feedback for this attempt.
shared.ai_summary_failed: AI summary generation failed for this attempt.
shared.ai_summary_left_unavailable: AI summary is not available because this attempt was ended as user left.

analytics.heatmap_summary: {{count}} practice days in the last year

validation.non_negative: Enter zero or a positive number.

dashboard.title: Admin dashboard
dashboard.description: A snapshot of the current content library and recent exam activity.
dashboard.snapshot_note: This dashboard is built from the existing admin list endpoints, so the metrics reflect the currently loaded snapshot rather than global totals.

reading.title: Reading builder
reading.description: Create and maintain reading tests, passages, blocks, questions, options and answers.
reading.empty_description: No reading tests have been created yet.
reading.invalid_test: The requested reading test could not be found.
reading.detail_description: Manage the reading test structure and every nested item from one place.
reading.manual_answers_description: Use this section to update or delete answers when the backend response does not expose answer identifiers.
reading.answer_contract_note: The read API does not expose answer identifiers, so updating or deleting answers requires the answer id manually.
reading.empty_passages: This test does not have any passages yet.
reading.empty_blocks: This passage does not have any blocks yet.
reading.empty_questions: This block does not have any questions yet.

delete_help.test: This removes the reading test and every nested passage, block and question.
delete_help.passage: This removes the passage and every nested block and question.
delete_help.block: This removes the block and every nested question.
delete_help.question: This removes the question, options and answers.

dialogs.delete_description: This permanently removes the reading test.

listening.title: Listening builder
listening.description: Create and maintain listening tests, parts, blocks, questions, options and answers.
listening.empty_description: No listening tests have been created yet.
listening.invalid_test: The requested listening test could not be found.
listening.detail_description: Manage listening test settings, structure and question flow from one screen.
listening.manual_answers_description: Use this section to update or delete answers when you already know the answer id.
listening.answer_contract_note: The backend does not expose listening answer identifiers in the read response, so answer updates and deletes require the answer id manually.
listening.option_contract_note: The listening detail response does not expose option correctness, so the list view cannot confirm which option is correct after reading the test.
listening.empty_parts: This test does not have any parts yet.
listening.empty_blocks: This part does not have any blocks yet.
listening.empty_questions: This block does not have any questions yet.

delete_help.test: This removes the listening test and every nested part, block and question.
delete_help.part: This removes the listening part and every nested block and question.
delete_help.block: This removes the block and every nested question.
delete_help.question: This removes the question, options and answers.

dialogs.delete_description: This permanently removes the listening test.

writing.title: Writing builder
writing.description: Create and maintain writing tests and their task parts.
writing.empty_description: No writing tests have been created yet.
writing.invalid_test: The requested writing test could not be found.
writing.detail_description: Manage writing test settings and task parts from one screen.
writing.empty_parts: This test does not have any writing parts yet.

delete_help.test: This removes the writing test and all of its parts.

dialogs.delete_description: This permanently removes the writing test.

lessons.title: Lessons
lessons.description: Manage lesson categories and the lesson library used by the platform.
lessons.category_required_note: Create at least one category before adding lessons.
lessons.empty_categories: No lesson categories have been created yet.
lessons.empty_lessons: No lessons have been created yet.

dialogs.delete_category_description: This permanently removes the selected category.
dialogs.delete_lesson_description: This permanently removes the selected lesson.

exams.title: Exam reviews
exams.description: Inspect exam attempts by module and review writing submissions.
exams.empty_description: No exam attempts were found for this module.
exams.detail_description: The admin exam detail endpoint currently returns summary metadata for the selected exam.
exams.review_note: Writing review is manual because the admin exam endpoints do not expose writing exam part ids or full writing content in the detail response.
exams.review_description: Use the exam part id to mark a writing submission as checked and store corrections or a score.
